name: hexo-theme-shion
description: A Hexo blog theme themed around Shion Yorigami from Touhou Project

scripts.build: npm run build:ts && npm run build:client && npm run build:scss
scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run sync && concurrently -n scss,ts,client,hexo -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "npm:watch:scss" "npm:watch:ts" "npm:watch:client" "npm:demo:server"
scripts.preview: npm run build && npm run sync && npm run demo:clean && npm run demo:generate && npm run demo:server
